title: Gib`own #1391
definition:
Gibeon = "hill city"

 1) a Levitical city of Benjamin, modern 'el-Jib', which lies 5 miles
    or 8 km from Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gibeon = "hill city"

 1) a Levitical city of Benjamin, modern 'el-Jib', which lies 5 miles
    or 8 km from Jerusalem

    NASB:  a Levitical city in Benjamin
